task_completion.description: Open the target presentation and navigate to Slide 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress is open showing the file 'product_launch_roadmap.odp' and Slide 2 ('Phase Roadmap') is selected in the slide pane.

task_completion.description: Insert three chevron shapes onto the slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are at least three distinct chevron (block arrow) shapes visible on Slide 2.

task_completion.description: Add the specified text to the shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The texts 'Market Analysis', 'Prototype Development', and 'Global Release' are clearly visible inside the chevron shapes.
The three chevron shapes are arranged side-by-side in a horizontal row across the slide.

task_completion.description: Apply a blue color gradient to the shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chevron shapes are filled with a blue color gradient (showing a transition between different shades of blue) rather than a solid flat color.
The save icon is clicked or the file shows no unsaved changes indicator (e.g., no asterisk next to the filename in the title bar) after modifications are complete.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to modify the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the LibreOffice Impress menus, toolbars, and shape properties rather than running terminal commands or python scripts to modify the .odp file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual presentation software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Impress interface is clearly visible with its standard toolbars, slide panes, and properties deck, not a text editor or alternative software.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file using the application's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking 'File > Save', pressing Ctrl+S, or clicking the floppy disk save icon in the LibreOffice Impress toolbar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/product_launch_roadmap.odp'. The modifications must be made on Slide 2 (slide index 1). The final slide must contain at least 3 shapes. The shapes must contain the exact texts: 'Market Analysis', 'Prototype Development', and 'Global Release'.
